_comment: Single source of truth for naming invariants left behind by a plugin/skill/repo rename. The legacynames acs gate (go/acs/regression/legacynames) AND `evolve release` preflight scan every tracked file for each forbidden[].token and BLOCK on a match; `evolve names fix` rewrites forbidden->replacement. When a rename leaves a dead token behind, add a row here — do NOT hand-write a new one-off gate. canonical{} documents what the names ARE now (intent); forbidden[] is the enforced part. exclude[] entries are git pathspecs, applied as ':!<entry>'.

forbidden.reason: pre-#235 GitHub repo slug; returns 404 after the repo was renamed to evolve-loop
dead plugin install handle; the plugin/command namespace was renamed to evo on 2026-06-24
pre-evo slash-command namespace, e.g. /evolve-loop:loop; boundary-anchored so it ignores <repo>/evolve-loop:<ref> URLs
